channel.title: The HrmX Blog
channel.description: I don't know why I run this, but this is the HrmX blog! an RSS feed that lets you stay up to date on what Engineer and Musician Roberto Selles is up to.

item.title: My Brackeys Jam 2023.2 Experience
item.description: Brackeys Game Jam is a game jam hosted by the Brackeys community. Brackeys was a game developer who used to run tutorials, but has decided to stop game development to do other things; However even though things are done there, the community decided to keep things running, and the Brackeys Game Jam resumes. I decided to take part in it and create my own game using C++ and Raylib, to not only pad my resume, but share what I can make in C++! And so I made Mariana's Trench - The Game.
